\tzpentry{ID5769}{Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5769 introduces Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{\partial \mathbf{B}}{\partial t} = \nabla \times (\mathbf{v}\times \mathbf{B}) + \eta \nabla^{2}\mathbf{B} + \mathbf{F}_{\text{tidal}}(t), \label{eq:master_unified_field} \end{equation}
